steps.t: Thrymm was hurled north-west by Núrzum. You should <rgb=#FF0000>look</rgb> north-west of Scylfig for signs of Thrymm. <rgb=#FF0000>N…
The item that caught your eye (a horn, perhaps) is just to the west of your last vantage point. You should examine the item you spotted in the snow.
A body lies below the horn in the north-western Writhendowns, upon the road. You should investigate the body, for it is likely Thrymm's.
Cyneberg is in Scylfig. You should return to Cyneberg and show her the horn.
Gárwig, the Reeve of Wildermore, can be found in Forlaw. Cyneberg has asked you to deliver Thrymm's horn to Gárwig.
